channel.title: Openssl on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Openssl on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: OpenSSL Cheat Sheet
item.description:
Get things done with OpenSSL

Private Key

Generate (old devices don’t like keys longer than 2048)

openssl genrsa -aes128 -out example.key 2048

Remove password protection

openssl rsa -in example.key -out example_open.key

Certificate Generation

CSR template file (public CAs don’t accept IP alternative names)

[ req ]
prompt = no
distinguished_name = dn
req_extensions = req_ext

[ dn ]
CN = example.com
emailAddress = me@example.com
O = Corp.
OU = Geek
L = City
ST = State
C = Country

[ req_ext ]
subjectAltName = @alt_names

[ alt_names ]
DNS.1 = example.com
IP.1 = 10.11.12.13

Generate the CSR from the template
